allow: PowerShell("=== docs/ tree ==="; Get-ChildItem docs -Recurse -File | Select-Object Length, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize; "=== scripts ==="; Get-ChildItem scripts -Recurse -File | Select-Object Length, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize; "=== runtime libs ==="; Get-ChildItem projects\\rtds-runtime\\globalLibraries\\active, projects\\rtds-runtime\\callScripts | Select-Object @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}}, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell("=== .claude/skills ==="; Get-ChildItem .claude\\skills -Directory | Select-Object Name; "=== templates? ==="; Test-Path templates; "=== backups ==="; Get-ChildItem backups -Recurse -File | Select-Object Length, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize; "=== callflow dirs ==="; \(Get-ChildItem callflow_json_config -File\).Count; \(Get-ChildItem callflow_json_config_vocalls_acc -File\).Count; \(Get-ChildItem callflow_json_config_vocalls_prd -File\).Count)

PowerShell(python c:\\Users\\merte\\dev\\vocalls-rtds\\.claude\\skills\\rtds-flowdata-config-gen\\scripts\\extract_flow.py c:\\Users\\merte\\dev\\vocalls-rtds\\flowData\\DA-SW-OMGEVING-2NDLINE.xml > "$env:TEMP\\claude\\extract_test.json"; python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(r'$env:TEMP\\claude\\extract_test.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('nodes:', len\(d['nodes']\), 'edges:', len\(d['edges']\)\); [print\(n['id'], '|', n.get\('Type', n.get\('SubType','?'\)\), '|', \(n.get\('label',''\) or n.get\('Expression',''\)\)[:60].replace\(chr\(10\),' '\)\) for n in d['nodes']]")

PowerShell(python c:\\Users\\merte\\dev\\vocalls-rtds\\.claude\\skills\\rtds-flowdata-config-gen\\scripts\\extract_flow.py c:\\Users\\merte\\dev\\vocalls-rtds\\flowData\\DA-SW-OMGEVING-2NDLINE.xml | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$env:TEMP\\claude\\extract_test.json"; python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(r'$env:TEMP\\claude\\extract_test.json', encoding='utf-8-sig'\)\); print\('nodes:', len\(d['nodes']\), 'edges:', len\(d['edges']\)\); [print\(n['id'], '|', n.get\('Type', n.get\('SubType','?'\)\), '|', \(n.get\('label',''\) or n.get\('Expression',''\)\)[:70].replace\(chr\(10\),' '\)\) for n in d['nodes']]")
